description: You are a Technical SEO Analyst investigating 'Too Many Redirects' errors reported by users. Your goal is to identify infinite redirect loops on the test site https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the list of detected redirect loops to a CSV file at ~/Documents/SEO/exports/redirect_loops.csv. Additionally, create a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/loop_analysis.txt that lists the total number of loops found and provides one example URL that is looping.
